channel.title: Chuck Akre — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by Chuck Akre (Akre Capital Management) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: Chuck Akre: ADDED MA (+4%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chuck Akre (Akre Capital Management) added MA in Q4 2025 · 17.8% of portfolio. Adding to Mastercard — long-time core.

item.title: Chuck Akre: TRIMMED META (-10%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chuck Akre (Akre Capital Management) trimmed META in Q4 2025 · 3.1% of portfolio. Trimming META exposure.

item.title: Chuck Akre: ADDED BN (+40%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chuck Akre (Akre Capital Management) added BN (BROOKFIELD CORP) in Q4 2025 · 13.5% of portfolio.

item.title: Chuck Akre: TRIMMED V (-10%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chuck Akre (Akre Capital Management) trimmed V (VISA INC) in Q4 2025 · 10.3% of portfolio.

item.title: Chuck Akre: TRIMMED MCO (-18%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chuck Akre (Akre Capital Management) trimmed MCO (MOODYS CORP) in Q4 2025 · 9.7% of portfolio.

item.title: Chuck Akre: TRIMMED AMT (-42%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chuck Akre (Akre Capital Management) trimmed AMT (AMERICAN TOWER CORP NEW) in Q4 2025 · 0.5% of portfolio.

item.title: Chuck Akre: TRIMMED DHR (-92%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chuck Akre (Akre Capital Management) trimmed DHR (DANAHER CORPORATION) in Q4 2025 · 0.2% of portfolio.

item.title: Chuck Akre: TRIMMED BRK.B (-15%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chuck Akre (Akre Capital Management) trimmed BRK.B (BERKSHIRE HATHAWAY INC DEL) in Q4 2025 · 0.1% of portfolio.

item.title: Chuck Akre: EXITED VRSK (-100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chuck Akre (Akre Capital Management) exited VRSK (VERISK ANALYTICS INC) in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
